manifest.name: Local LLM Helper

name: Local LLM Helper

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Added optional Obsidian Markdown rendering for assistant responses across chat views, enabled by default.
- Added a quick markdown toggle in the chat sidebar header plus a persistent `Render markdown in chat` setting.
- Kept the plain escaped-text path available for users who prefer the old rendering behavior.
- Preserved raw markdown copy behavior, so copying a rendered response still pastes markdown text into a note.
- Updated `esbuild` to 0.28.1 to clear the current npm audit finding.

## Verification

- `npm audit`
- `npm run build`
- Manual Obsidian smoke test of rendered markdown and plain-text toggle behavior.
- GitHub Actions release workflow passed and uploaded `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.

Fixes #15.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Added optional Embedding server URL and Embedding API key settings so RAG indexing can use a separate OpenAI-compatible embedding server.
- Kept the current single-server setup as the default: blank embedding server inherits the chat/default server, and blank embedding key inherits the chat/default key.
- Added support for `not-needed` on the embedding API key to suppress the Authorization header.
- Updated chat and embedding model browsing so each picker queries the correct effective server.
- Stored embedding metadata now records the effective embedding server and model without storing API keys; old indexes remain loadable and still recommend re-indexing when the embedding backend changes.

## Verification

- `npm run build`
- `git diff --check`
- GitHub Actions release workflow passed and uploaded `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Added a dockable LLM Chat sidebar so chat no longer blocks the active note.
- Combined General and Notes chat into one sidebar with scoped note chat support.
- Added a multiline composer, target context chip, Stop state, inline readiness/error banners, and a verification reminder.
- Improved source citations with note titles and paths that open in the main editor.

Fixes #13.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What changed
- Added SearXNG as a self-hosted search provider for web and news search.
- Added a SearXNG instance URL setting with clear errors when JSON output is disabled or unavailable.
- Added more Obsidian notices for command failures, completed chat/workflow responses, related-note refresh failures, and approval-gated vault actions.

## Verification
- Built by the release workflow.
- Release assets include `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` with build provenance attestations.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug fixes

- **Fixed RAG indexing producing all-zero embedding vectors** on LM Studio and other OpenAI-compatible servers that don't honor `encoding_format=base64`. The plugin now calls `/v1/embeddings` directly via Obsidian's `requestUrl` and explicitly requests `encoding_format=float`, so embeddings come back correctly. Resolves #10.
- Added a validation pass that throws a clear error if a server ever returns an all-zero vector, so this failure mode can't silently recur.

## Security

- Updated `axios`, `follow-redirects`, and `yaml` to patch moderate-severity advisories (SSRF, auth header leak, stack overflow).

## Action required

If you had notes indexed with a previous version and RAG chat was returning poor or irrelevant results, open **Settings → Notes Index** and click **Re-index notes** to regenerate embeddings with valid vectors.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
What's in this release:                                                                                  
  - Saved Custom Prompts — save and reuse prompts via command palette/fuzzy picker                         
  - Persona Editing — create/edit/delete personas from settings                                            
  - Reasoning Extraction — strips <think>/<reasoning>/<thought> blocks                                     
  - Model Picker — fetches available models from your server                                               
  - Fixes — server URL normalization, security vulnerability cleanup

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug Fixes                                                                                                
  - Fixed API key not being sent in chat requests — affects streaming, non-streaming, and chat modal paths
  (#9)                                                                             
  - Better error messages for authentication failures (401) — now surfaces a clear notice instead of a     
  generic error                                                                                            

  Improvements                                                                                             
  - Added CORS note to streaming setting description — servers must have CORS enabled for streaming to work

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug Fixes

  - Embedding model changes now apply immediately — previously, changing the embedding model in
  settings had no effect until restarting the plugin
  - Settings save reliably on close — changing a text field and closing settings quickly no longer
  drops the change

  New

  - Tavily search provider — use Tavily as an alternative to Brave for web and news search
  - Search provider picker — switch between Tavily and Brave from Settings → Integrations

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ New Features                                                                                         

  Redesigned RAG Chat Interface                                                                           
  - New welcome screen with example queries to get started          
  - Clickable sources that open files directly in Obsidian                                                
  - Clear conversation button                                                                             
  - Better message styling and error states                             
  
  Changelog in Settings                                                                                   
  - View version history anytime from Settings → About → View changelog                                                                   
  
🧠 RAG Improvements                                                                                     
  Smarter Indexing                                                                                        
  - Chunking with overlap - preserves context at chunk boundaries                                         
  - Incremental indexing - only re-indexes files that changed (much faster!)                              
  - Content preprocessing - strips YAML frontmatter, cleans markdown syntax                               
  - Settings changes no longer wipe your index                                                                                            
  
  Better Search                                                                                           
  - Improved RAG prompt for more accurate answers                                                         
  - Better error messages when notes aren't indexed                                                             
  
  🎨 UI/UX Improvements                                                                                   
  Commands & Menu                                                                                         
  - Commands reorganized with prefixes: Text:, Chat:, Web:, Notes:, Settings:                             
  - Ribbon menu grouped logically with visual separators                                                  
  - RAG chat added to ribbon menu                                                                         
  
  Settings                                                                                                
  - Settings page reorganized into 7 clear sections                                                       
  - Cleaner labels and descriptions                                                                       
  
  Prompts                                                                                                 
  - All text processing prompts improved for better LLM output                                            
  - Persona prompts rewritten to be shorter and more actionable

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Changes in this release:                                                                                
  - ✨ New "Edit selected text with prompt" feature                                                       
  - 🔒 Fixed 6 security vulnerabilities (langchain, axios, form-data, js-yaml, brace-expansion)           
  - 🔧 Better error messages for embedding failures                                                       
  - ⬆️ TypeScript upgraded to v5.x

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🔧 Critical Bug Fix
  - Fixed embeddings re-generating on every Obsidian restart
  - Proper persistent storage prevents data conflicts between settings and embeddings

  🚀 New Features
  - Storage diagnostics command (Ctrl+P → "RAG Storage Diagnostics")
  - Startup notifications showing loaded embedding count
  - Enhanced console logging for debugging

  ⚡ Improvements
  - Better Ollama API error handling
  - Settings panel shows correct indexed file count
  - Separate storage files for settings vs embeddings

  Upgrade Notes: Existing users may need to re-index notes once after this update for optimal performance.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This release introduces significant new capabilities and improvements to the Local LLM Helper plugin.

  ### ✨ New Features

  **🔄 Multi-Provider Support**
  - Added support for **OpenAI** and **LM Studio** alongside existing Ollama integration
  - Easy provider switching in settings - choose between Ollama, OpenAI, or LM Studio
  - Seamless compatibility with OpenAI-compatible APIs

  **⚙️ Enhanced Configuration**
  - **Temperature control** - Fine-tune response creativity (0-1 range)
  - **Max tokens setting** - Control response length
  - More granular control over AI behavior

  ### 🔧 Improvements

  **📁 Code Organization**
  - Complete refactoring with files moved to `src/` directory
  - Better project structure and maintainability
  - Cleaner separation of concerns

  **🐛 Bug Fixes**
  - Fixed server URL tooltip inconsistency (was "Server address", now consistently "Server URL")
  - Improved user interface clarity

  **🔒 Security**
  - Updated axios dependency to fix security vulnerability
  - Enhanced dependency management

  ### 🤖 Provider Options

  - **Ollama** (default) - For local models
  - **OpenAI** - For OpenAI API integration
  - **LM Studio** - For local OpenAI-compatible servers

  ### 🛠️ Technical Improvements

  - Better error handling across providers
  - Improved API compatibility
  - Enhanced settings validation
  - Streamlined provider initialization
